title: Memory Market
short_description: The fruit stall keeps hiding under the baskets! Flip two at a time to find every matching pair.
description: Welcome to the Memory Market, where the fruit stall keeps hiding under the baskets! You get a quick peek at the whole market, then everything flips face-down — now flip two baskets at a time to find matching pairs. Remember where each fruit was, match them all, and try to do it in as few flips as possible. It's the classic concentration memory game that trains visual memory, focus and concentration, with a peek-and-remember twist and a fewer-flips scoring bonus. Younger players match 6 pairs; older players take on a bustling 10-pair market. A free online memory and concentration game for kids in grades 1–5, with efficiency bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap two baskets to flip them and find matching pairs.
